plist.dict:
NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription This app needs speech recognition to detect when you say 'Ok/Hey Nimbus' or 'Ok/Hey Numbers' to launch drone control commands. DJISDKAppKey DJISDKAppKey ELEVENLABS_API_KEY <<<<<<< HEAD ELEVENLABS_API_KEY ======= a565fc97fe1f3cc5570bd0c7f822d9882b10588e1a9016386079984967aa2ad4 >>>>>>> 5fcfe6f535d9a202aba7b8cace6455a0c5477e2b NSAppTransportSecurity
NSAllowsArbitraryLoads
UISupportedExternalAccessoryProtocols
com.dji.video com.dji.protocol com.dji.common
